title: YouTube’s mobile app finally lets you share timestamped videos
summary: YouTube is adding the ability to share videos from a specific timestamp on mobile, making it easier to point viewers to particular parts of a video. However, this will replace the Clips feature that previously allowed users to create shareable clips with custom descriptions and end times.
content:
YouTube is making some changes that might affect how you share videos from the mobile app. From the app, you can finally share videos from a specific timestamp, which will make it easier to point someone to a part of a video you might want them to see while you're on your phone. However, this change will replace the Clips feature that lets you make a shareable clip from a video.
You'll still be able to watch any Clips that you've already made. But moving forward, "the ability to set an end time or include a custom description when sharing will no longer be available," YouTube says. The company notes that while clipping is "important way for …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: YouTube 移动应用终于让你分享带时间戳的视频
zh.summary: YouTube 正在添加从手机上的特定时间戳分享视频的功能，使用户更容易将观看者指向视频的特定部分。但这将替代之前允许用户创建带有自定义描述和结束时间的可分享剪辑的 Clips 功能。

title: Lucasfilm drops The Mandalorian and Grogu final trailer at CinemaCon
summary: Lucasfilm premiered the final trailer for The Mandalorian and Grogu at CinemaCon, teasing new developments in the Star Wars series. The tagline hints at themes of intergenerational relationships within the beloved franchise's expanding universe.
content: "The old protect the young, and then the young protect the old."

zh.title: 卢卡斯影业在CinemaCon上发布《曼达洛人和格罗古》最终预告片
zh.summary: 卢卡斯影业在CinemaCon上首映了《曼达洛人和格罗古》的最终预告片，暗示《星球大战》系列中的新发展。标语暗示该深受喜爱的特许经营扩展宇宙中的代际关系主题。

title: Factory hits $1.5B valuation to build AI coding for enterprises
summary: Factory, a three-year-old startup developing AI-powered coding tools for enterprises, raised $150 million led by Khosla Ventures, achieving a $1.5 billion valuation. This reflects strong investor interest in enterprise AI development solutions.
content: The three-year-old startup raised $150 million led by Khosla Ventures.

zh.title: Factory 获得 15 亿美元估值以开发企业 AI 编码解决方案
zh.summary: Factory 是一家三岁的初创公司，为企业开发人工智能编码工具，由 Khosla Ventures 领导融资 1.5 亿美元，估值达 15 亿美元。这反映了投资者对企业 AI 开发解决方案的强烈兴趣。

title: Luma launches AI-powered production studio with faith-focused Wonder Project
summary: Luma has launched an AI-powered production studio, with its first project being a faith-focused series about Moses starring Academy Award-winner Ben Kingsley, releasing on Prime Video this spring. This expansion demonstrates Luma's push into AI-driven content production.
content: The studio's first project will be about Moses and star Academy Award-winner Ben Kingsley, to be released this spring on Prime Video.

zh.title: Luma 推出 AI 驱动的制片工作室，以信仰为主题的 Wonder Project
zh.summary: Luma 推出了 AI 驱动的制片工作室，其首个项目是以信仰为主题的摩西系列，由奥斯卡奖得主本·金斯利主演，将于今年春季在 Prime Video 上线。这一扩展表明 Luma 正在积极推进 AI 驱动的内容制作。

title: Intel refreshes non-Ultra Core CPUs with new silicon for the first time
summary: Intel is updating its non-Ultra Core CPU lineup with new silicon technology for the first time in a while, bringing improvements to mainstream consumer processors. This expansion of new Intel architecture to mainstream chips addresses a wider market beyond premium options.
content: For the first time in a while, the benefits of new Intel tech will trickle down.

zh.title: 英特尔首次用新硅芯片更新非Ultra Core CPU
zh.summary: 英特尔正在用新的硅芯片技术更新其非Ultra Core CPU产品线，这是一段时间以来的首次更新，为主流消费者处理器带来了改进。这种将新英特尔架构扩展到主流芯片的做法解决了超越高端选项的更广泛市场。

title: Netflix co-founder and chair Reed Hastings to leave board
summary: Reed Hastings, Netflix's co-founder and current chairman, will step down from the board when his term expires in June after nearly 30 years. Hastings transformed the entertainment industry by building Netflix from physical DVD rental to streaming dominance.
content: Hastings helped to transform the video rental industry — first with physical, then digital, delivery.

zh.title: Netflix联合创始人兼主席里德·黑斯廷斯将离任董事会
zh.summary: Netflix联合创始人兼现任董事长里德·黑斯廷斯在担任近30年后，将在六月任期届满时退出董事会。黑斯廷斯通过将Netflix从实体DVD租赁转变为流媒体霸主，改变了娱乐产业。

title: OpenAI starts offering a biology-tuned LLM
summary: OpenAI is launching GPT-Rosalind, a specialized large language model trained on biology workflows and available in closed access. This marks OpenAI's expansion into domain-specific AI models beyond general-purpose applications.
content: GPT-Rosalind is an LLM trained on biology workflows, available in closed access.

zh.title: OpenAI开始提供针对生物学调优的LLM
zh.summary: OpenAI正在推出GPT-Rosalind，这是一个在生物学工作流基础上训练的专业大型语言模型，目前处于关闭访问状态。这标志着OpenAI从通用AI模型扩展到特定领域AI模型的努力。

title: As they got close to the Moon, Artemis II astronauts were eager to land
summary: Artemis II astronauts expressed strong enthusiasm about landing on the Moon as they approached their destination during the NASA mission. This reflects the emotional significance and long-anticipated achievement of the Artemis program.
content: "If you had given us the keys to the lander, we would have taken it down."

zh.title: 当接近月球时，阿尔忒弥斯二号宇航员渴望登陆
zh.summary: 阿尔忒弥斯二号宇航员在接近目的地时对登陆月球表示了强烈的热情，这是美国宇航局任务的一部分。这反映了阿尔忒弥斯计划在情感上的意义和长期以来期待已久的成就。

title: Mozilla launches Thunderbolt AI client with focus on self-hosted infrastructure
summary: Mozilla has launched Thunderbolt, an AI client emphasizing self-hosted infrastructure, building on deepset's Haystack framework. The move aligns with Mozilla's vision for a decentralized open-source AI ecosystem.
content: New tool builds on deepset’s Haystack toward a “decentralized open source AI ecosystem.”

zh.title: Mozilla推出专注于自托管基础设施的Thunderbolt AI客户端

title: Upscale AI in talks to raise at $2B valuation, says report
summary: Upscale AI, an AI infrastructure company founded seven months ago, is reportedly in discussions to raise its third funding round at a $2 billion valuation. The rapid growth highlights strong investor appetite for AI infrastructure solutions.
content: AI infrastructure company Upscale AI is reportedly in talks to raise its third funding round since launching just seven months ago.

zh.title: Upscale AI据报道以20亿美元估值融资谈判中
zh.summary: 据报道，成立仅七个月的AI基础设施公司Upscale AI正在讨论以20亿美元估值进行第三轮融资。这种快速增长凸显了投资者对AI基础设施解决方案的强劲需求。

title: Gucci-branded Google smart glasses are coming next year
summary: Google is partnering with Gucci parent company Kering to launch branded AI smart glasses in 2027, combining fashion with Google's Project Aura Android XR technology. This partnership aims to make smart glasses more desirable to consumers following Google's earlier attempts at the category.
content:
Google’s “Project Aura” will be its first Android XR glasses, expected later this year. | Image: Google, Xreal	

Google is reportedly partnering with Gucci to make a pair of AI smart glasses stylish enough people might actually want to wear them. According to Reuters, Gucci parent company Kering is planning to launch the glasses sometime in 2027. 
Google's first pair of Android XR glasses, "Project Aura," are expected to launch this year. They feature essentially the same look as Meta's Ray-Ban glasses, with chunky, black plastic frames. They'll usher in Google's second attempt at smart glasses, after Google Glass infamously failed to catch on over a decade ago. 
Last year, Google also announced glasses partnerships with Warby Parker and Gentle Monst …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 古驰品牌谷歌智能眼镜将于明年推出
zh.summary: 谷歌与古驰母公司开云集团合作，将于2027年推出品牌AI智能眼镜，将时尚与谷歌Project Aura Android XR技术相结合。这一合作旨在使智能眼镜对消费者更具吸引力，以应对谷歌早前在该领域的未成功尝试。

title: Ballmer gives $80 million to NPR, with strings attached
summary: Connie Ballmer, wife of former Microsoft CEO Steve Ballmer, donated $80 million to NPR for digital innovation, roughly equivalent to seven years of lost government funding. The donation comes with restrictions and may not fully prevent NPR job cuts.
content:
Connie Ballmer, wife of former Microsoft CEO Steve Ballmer and co-founder of the Ballmer Group, has given $80 million to NPR. That's roughly seven years' worth of government funding ($11.2m) after Trump and Congress cut funds for public media, but only a fraction of NPR's full annual budget of $300 million. NPR may still cut jobs because the money has strings attached.
The money is specifically "to support the digital innovation that is essential to meeting the needs and serving the interests of public media audiences wherever they are and whenever they seek information," according to a press release. NPR journalist David Folkenflik writes  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 鲍尔默向NPR捐赠8000万美元，附带条件
zh.summary: 微软前首席执行官史蒂夫·鲍尔默的妻子康妮·鲍尔默向NPR捐赠8000万美元用于数字创新，相当于七年政府资金的损失。该捐款附带限制条件，可能不足以完全阻止NPR的裁员。

title: Netflix embraces vertical video with major mobile app update
summary: Netflix is redesigning its mobile app to include a vertical video feed, launching at the end of April, recognizing the blurred lines between television and mobile entertainment. The update reflects Netflix's expansion into video podcasts and mobile-first content.
content:
Netflix announced on Thursday that it will be launching a redesigned mobile app, which will include a vertical video feed, at the end of April. "This redesign will better reflect our expanding entertainment offering and make it easier for members to engage how and when they want," the company said in its Q1 2026 earnings letter to shareholders.
In Thursday's letter, the company said that the lines between "entertainment on TV and mobile devices are blurring," noting that video podcasts "over-index" on mobile. Co-CEO Greg Peters said in January that the company was planning to revamp its mobile UI as a way to "better serve the expansion of o …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Netflix拥抱竖屏视频，推出重大移动应用更新

title: Physical Intelligence, a hot robotics startup, says its new robot brain can figure out tasks it was never taught
summary: Physical Intelligence developed π0.7, a new AI model for robots that can learn and perform tasks without explicit training, representing a meaningful step toward general-purpose robotics. This advancement could enable robots to adapt to unfamiliar situations more flexibly than current specialized systems.
content: The new model, called π0.7, represents what the company describes as an early but meaningful step toward the long-sought goal of a general-purpose robot brain.

zh.title: 热门机器人创业公司Physical Intelligence称其新机器人大脑能够执行未经训练的任务
zh.summary: Physical Intelligence开发了π0.7，一个能够学习并执行未经明确训练的任务的新型机器人AI模型，这是向通用机器人迈进的重要一步。这一进步使机器人能比当前专业系统更灵活地适应陌生情形。

title: Netflix cofounder Reed Hastings is officially leaving the company
summary: Netflix co-founder and chairman Reed Hastings will not seek re-election to the board when his term expires in June, ending his nearly 30-year tenure. Hastings is remembered for transforming the entertainment industry and fostering Netflix's innovative culture.
content:
Netflix cofounder and chairman Reed Hastings plans to leave the company after nearly 30 years. The news comes as part of Netflix's Q1 2026 earnings results released on Thursday, which says Hastings "will not stand for re-election to our Board when his current term expires at the Annual Meeting in June."
After co-founding Netflix in 1997, Hastings served as CEO from 1999 to 2023, when he stepped down and took on the role of chairman. "My real contribution at Netflix wasn't a single decision; it was a focus on member joy, building a culture that others could inherit and improve, and building a company that could be both beloved by members and …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Netflix联合创始人里德·黑斯廷斯正式离开公司
zh.summary: Netflix联合创始人兼董事长里德·黑斯廷斯在其任期于6月到期时不再寻求连任，结束了近30年的任职生涯。黑斯廷斯因改变娱乐产业并培养Netflix创新文化而被铭记。

title: From the Startup Battlefield stage to the International Space Station: geCKo Materials built a sticky product
summary: geCKo Materials, a startup that pitched at a competition, developed adhesive technology now used on the International Space Station. This represents notable commercial validation of the startup's innovation in space applications.
content: This week on Build Mode, Isabelle Johannessen speaks with Capella Kerst, founder and CEO of geCKo Materials.

title: Slash, a Ramp competitor founded by teenagers, raises $100M at $1.4B valuation
summary: Slash, a Ramp competitor founded by teenagers, has raised $100 million at a $1.4 billion valuation with the company now generating $300 million in annualized revenue. The five founders, now 24 years old, have scaled their expense management platform significantly.
content: Five years later the founders, now 24 years old, say their startup has achieved $300 million in annualized revenue.

summary: OpenAI has announced major upgrades to its agentic coding tool Codex, expanding capabilities to give developers greater control over desktop environments. The enhanced tool represents OpenAI's competitive response to similar offerings from Anthropic.

zh.summary: OpenAI宣布对其智能编码工具Codex进行重大升级，扩展功能以为开发者提供对桌面环境的更强控制力。该增强工具代表OpenAI对Anthropic类似产品的竞争回应。

title: Ad firms settle with Trump FTC over claims they boycotted conservative media
summary: Ad firms have settled with the FTC over allegations they boycotted conservative media outlets like Breitbart and X. The settlement aims to eliminate brand-safety standards that disproportionately harmed conservative platforms.
content: FTC aims to stamp out brand-safety standards that hurt Breitbart and Musk's X.

title: Live Nation says it will fight monopoly suit loss
summary: A jury found Live Nation-Ticketmaster violated antitrust law on multiple counts, determining the company overcharged consumers $1.72 per ticket through monopolistic practices. Live Nation announced plans to challenge the verdict through post-trial motions and appeals.
content:
After a jury found that Live Nation-Ticketmaster violated antitrust law on several counts, the company warns in a blog post that the verdict "is not the last word on this matter."
The company plans to renew a motion for the judge to issue a ruling against the states, claiming that they did not prove their case as a matter of law. It also awaits the court's decision on a separate motion to strike the testimony of one of the states' expert witness, whose analysis they say helped inform the jury's damages award. The jury found that Ticketmaster overcharged consumers $1.72 per ticket.
"Of course, Live Nation can and will appeal any unfavorable …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Live Nation表示将对垄断诉讼败诉提起上诉
zh.summary: 陪审团裁定Live Nation-Ticketmaster多项违反反垄断法，该公司通过垄断行为每张票对消费者超收1.72美元。Live Nation宣布将通过诉讼后动议和上诉挑战该判决。

title: Ozlo’s comfy Sleepbuds are nearly 30 percent off in the run-up to Mother’s Day
summary: Ozlo Sleepbuds are on sale for $249 (30% off) ahead of Mother's Day, offering comfortable sleep solutions built by former Bose engineers. The earbuds function as a white noise machine, support custom audio playback, and include newly added sleep tracking features.
content:
If you’re struggling to get a full night of rest, a good pair of sleep earbuds can help you tune out unwanted distractions. The Ozlo Sleepbuds are one such option, and they’re currently available for $249 ($100 off) in the run-up to Mother’s Day at Amazon and Ozlo’s online storefront, which is easily the lowest price we’ve seen. 
Ozlo Sleepbuds 

Where to Buy:

 $349 $249 at Amazon
 $349 $249 at Ozlo
 $349 $259.99 at Best Buy

Made by former Bose engineers, Ozlo’s Sleepbuds are extremely similar to Bose’s discontinued Sleepbuds. They work well as a white noise machine and helped our reviewer, Victoria Song, get better sleep during her testing. The biggest upgrade over the Bose Sleepbuds II is that you’re no longer limited to a small library of white noise sounds. The Ozlo buds let you play your own audio, then switch back to white noise once you’ve fallen asleep. In our experience, that feature is a bit hit-or-miss, but when it does work, it’s helpful. In November, Ozlo added a host of sleep tracking features to both the earbuds and their charging case as part of a beta, allowing you to track your sleeping habits and the factors that might disrupt your cycle (we’ve yet to test them).
Otherwise, the Ozlo Sleepbuds are largely similar to the last-gen Bose. They’re lightweight, comfortable for side sleepers, and stay put overnight. Battery life still lasts up to 10 hours, which is enough for a full night, and you can set private alarms that won’t disturb anybody else. They’re not quite as advanced as Soundcore’s newer Sleep A30 earbuds — which offer active noise cancellation and an adaptive snore masking feature — but if you just want a comfortable pair of earbuds built specifically to help you sleep, they do the job quite nicely.

zh.title: Ozlo舒适睡眠耳塞在母亲节前夕享受近30%折扣
zh.summary: Ozlo睡眠耳塞在母亲节前夕以249美元（优惠30%）出售，这是由前Bose工程师开发的舒适睡眠解决方案。耳塞可作为白噪音机器使用，支持自定义音频播放，并新增了睡眠跟踪功能。

title: Teenage Engineering might be getting into instrument amps next
summary: Teenage Engineering appears to be entering the budget instrument amp market with the KO-Amp 35, according to an FCC filing for the unannounced device. The device features a rechargeable battery and Bluetooth connectivity and will be available in multiple colors.
content:
An unannounced Teenage Engineering device, the KO-Amp 35, can be found over at the FCC in a new filing. The label clearly marks it as a member of the mid-range EP family instruments, which currently includes the KO-II and its spinoffs, the Riddim and the Medieval. The name suggests that TE could be getting into the budget guitar and instrument amp space, but the filing reveals very little.
All we know is that it has a built-in rechargeable battery and Bluetooth, but little else. There is also a "model difference statement," which suggests the KO-Amp will come in multiple colors. The angle and distance of the images in the filing make it dif …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Teenage Engineering可能接下来涉足乐器放大器领域
zh.summary: 根据一份未公开设备的FCC备案，Teenage Engineering似乎正在进入经济型乐器放大器市场，推出KO-Amp 35。该设备配备可充电电池和蓝牙连接，将提供多种颜色可选。

title: European police email 75,000 people asking them to stop DDoS attacks
summary: Europol coordinated a law enforcement operation against for-hire DDoS services, resulting in four arrests and the takedown of 53 domains. The operation included warning emails sent to approximately 75,000 people engaged in DDoS activities.
content: Europol coordinated an operation against for-hire distributed denial-of-service (DDoS) services, including the arrest of four people and the takedown of 53 domains.

zh.title: 欧洲警方邮件通知75,000人停止DDoS攻击
zh.summary: 欧洲刑警组织协调了针对DDoS服务的执法行动，导致4人被捕，53个域名被关闭。该行动包括向大约75,000名从事DDoS活动的人员发送警告邮件。

title: The only way to fight deepfakes is by making deepfakes
summary: A journalist attempted to deceive her father using a deepfake voice call, discovering that the technology still contains detectable flaws that can alert listeners. The experiment highlights both advancing capabilities and current limitations of voice synthesis technology.
content:
I was unsure if my parents would notice that the voice on the other end wasn't mine - or that it was mine, sort of, but it wasn't me. The voice said hello, asked my dad how he was doing, and asked again when he didn't respond quickly enough. "What is that, Gaby?" He realized something was wrong almost immediately. I explained I had tried to trick him and it clearly hadn't worked. "It didn't," he said. "It sounded like a robot."
It wasn't a perfect experiment. My parents were out of the country, which made for a shoddy connection. They were having lunch with friends, and the voice couldn't deal with crosstalk or delays in the audio - it trie …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 对抗深度伪造的唯一办法就是制作深度伪造
zh.summary: 一位记者尝试使用深度伪造语音通话欺骗她的父亲，发现该技术仍然存在可被检测到的缺陷，可以提醒听众。该实验突出了语音合成技术的进步能力和当前局限性。

title: Casely has reannounced a power bank recall from 2025 following a fatality
summary: Casely has reannounced a recall of its 5,000mAh Power Pods wireless power banks following the death of a 75-year-old woman from injuries sustained during a battery explosion. The reannouncement comes after 28 additional incidents including a serious airline incident.
content:
Stop using this recalled wireless power bank immediately. | Image: Casely	

Casely first recalled over 429,000 of its 5,000mAh Power Pods wireless power banks in April 2025 following 51 reports of their lithium-ion batteries "overheating, expanding or catching fire," resulting in six minor burn injuries. Both the company and the US Consumer Product Safety Commission (USCPSC) are reannouncing the same recall today following 28 additional reports of batteries overheating. Those include a serious incident on a plane and the death of a 75-year-old New Jersey woman who "suffered second and third degree burns and later passed away from complications from her injuries" following an explosion, according to the USCPSC.
The  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Casely在一起死亡事件后重新宣布了2025年的移动电源召回
zh.summary: 在一名75岁女性在电池爆炸中丧生后，Casely重新宣布了对其5,000mAh Power Pods无线移动电源的召回。此次重新宣布是在28起额外事件（包括一起严重航空事件）之后进行的。

title: New Codex features include the ability to use your computer in the background
summary: OpenAI's updated Codex tool now includes an in-app browser feature that provides visual feedback while developers build websites and applications. The enhancement allows developers to see real-time results as they work, improving the development workflow.

title: Anthropic CPO leaves Figma’s board after reports he will offer a competing product
summary: Anthropic's Chief Product Officer has left Figma's board amid reports he will launch a competing product, signaling potential competitive tension in design and productivity software. The move highlights strategic stakes as AI reshapes the creator tools market.
content: A herald of the SAASpocalypse?

zh.title: Anthropic首席产品官在竞争产品报道后离开Figma董事会
zh.summary: Anthropic的首席产品官在报道称其将推出竞争产品后离开了Figma董事会，暗示设计和生产力软件领域可能存在竞争紧张。该举动凸显了AI重塑创意工具市场时的战略利益。

title: The Ukraine war's deep impact on Metro 2039’s development, story
summary: The upcoming sequel Metro 2039 will incorporate the impact of the Ukraine war into its narrative and development, aiming to present a uniquely Ukrainian perspective on post-apocalyptic storytelling. The game's developers are using the ongoing conflict as thematic inspiration.
content: Upcoming sequel wants to capture a "uniquely Ukrainian perspective" on the post-apocalypse.

zh.summary: 即将推出的续作《地铁2039》将把乌克兰战争的影响融入其叙事和开发中，旨在呈现关于后启示录故事讲述的独特乌克兰视角。游戏开发者正在使用这场持续的冲突作为主题灵感。

title: New undersea cable cutter risks Internet’s backbone
summary: China's recent demonstration of cable-cutting technology coincides with increased incidents of sabotage targeting subsea Internet cables, which carry the majority of global data traffic. The vulnerability of these underwater cables poses significant risks to global Internet infrastructure.
content: China cable-cutter demo coincides with more sabotage of subsea Internet cables.

zh.title: 新的海底光缆切割器威胁互联网的骨干网
zh.summary: 中国最近演示的光缆切割技术与针对海底互联网光缆的破坏事件增加相吻合，这些光缆承载全球大部分数据流量。这些水下光缆的脆弱性对全球互联网基础设施构成重大风险。

title: It’s not just you — Bluesky is (sorta) down
summary: Bluesky experienced service disruptions starting just before 3 a.m. ET, affecting user accessibility. The outage underscores ongoing infrastructure challenges for newer social platforms competing with established networks.
content: Bluesky has been experiencing ongoing service disruptions since just before 3 a.m. ET.

zh.title: 不只是你——Bluesky宕机了
zh.summary: Bluesky从美国东部时间凌晨3点前开始遭受服务中断，影响了用户可访问性。该故障凸显了新兴社交平台与成熟网络竞争时面临的持续基础设施挑战。

title: The nine best ways to protect, customize, and accessorize your MacBook Neo
summary: Apple's MacBook Neo offers competitive quality at an accessible $599 entry price, outperforming similarly priced Windows laptops despite using an iPhone chipset. The article recommends nine accessories including USB-C monitors and protective cases to enhance the expected bestselling laptop's usability.
content:
You can use the Neo as it comes out of the box, or enhance your experience with some add-on accessories. | Photo by Amelia Holowaty Krales / The Verge	

The MacBook Neo is poised to be a top-selling laptop in 2026, thanks in large part to its affordable $599 entry price. Despite launching at a more accessible price point than Apple’s $1,099 (though often discounted) 2026 MacBook Air, the Neo makes surprisingly few concessions in terms of build quality. Its design has the same level of precision as pricier Apple products, and we found in a hands-on comparison that it handily outclasses similarly priced Windows laptops in just about every way despite running on an iPhone chipset.
In short, you might want one, or perhaps you already have one. Whatever your situation is, it’s possible that you may also want a couple of accessories to get the most out of your Neo. We have nine recommendations — a MacBook Neo accessory starter kit, if you will — that can help you protect it, customize it, or just use it more comfortably in your day-to-day life.
A USB-C monitor to use as a second screen
Not every computer monitor supports USB-C video input, so the selection of ones that do is smaller (and often pricier) than if you just want a cheap model that only boasts HDMI or DisplayPort inputs. Whether you find a deal or not, the Asus ProArt PA278CV is an appealing (and relatively inexpensive) monitor that offers USB-C video-in as well as passthrough charging to keep your Neo charged. 
It’s a 27-inch 1440p monitor with a 75Hz refresh rate that’s color accurate. It features built-in speakers and can deliver 65W of power via USB-C, which is more than enough to keep the Neo charging at its peak 30W speed (faster than the 20W charger that Apple includes). It’s typically priced at $299 at retailers like Amazon and B&H Photo, but you might find it for as low as $209 if you’re lucky.
Asus 27-inch 1440p ProArt monitor

Where to Buy:

 $299.99 at Amazon
 $299.99 at B&H Photo

If you want somet

zh.title: 保护、定制和配置MacBook Neo的九种最佳方式
zh.summary: Apple的MacBook Neo提供了具有竞争力的品质和$599的平易近人的入门价格，尽管使用iPhone芯片组，但仍优于价格相近的Windows笔记本电脑。该文章推荐了九种配件，包括USB-C显示器和防护套，以增强这款预期畅销笔记本的可用性。

title: Everything we like is a psyop
summary: As TikTok's algorithmic feed increasingly shapes cultural trends, the article examines the blurred line between legitimate marketing and inauthentic growth hacking. The piece raises fundamental questions about authenticity in an algorithm-driven media landscape.
content: If culture is shaped by TikTok's algorithmic feed, then it's time for us to decide where we draw the line between necessary marketing and inauthentic growth hacking.

zh.title: 我们喜欢的一切都是心理战

title: Google now lets you explore the web side-by-side with AI Mode
summary: Google has updated AI Mode in Chrome to display web pages side-by-side with the chat interface when users click links. The enhancement allows follow-up questions about page content without switching tabs, improving the browsing experience with AI assistance.
content: Now, when you're using AI Mode on Chrome desktop, clicking a link will open the web page side-by-side with AI Mode.

zh.title: 谷歌现在让你可以与AI Mode并排浏览网页
zh.summary: 谷歌已更新Chrome中的AI Mode，可在用户点击链接时并排显示网页和聊天界面。此增强功能允许在不切换标签页的情况下对页面内容提出后续问题，改善了AI辅助的浏览体验。

title: OpenAI’s big Codex update is a direct shot at Claude Code
summary: OpenAI has significantly upgraded Codex with desktop app control, image generation, and context retention capabilities, directly targeting Claude Code's competitive advantage. The update reflects intensifying rivalry as OpenAI aggressively catches up in developer-focused AI tools.
content:
Codex can control apps on your desktop like Tic Tac Toe. | Image: OpenAI	

OpenAI is beefing up its agentic coding and development system, Codex, with a suite of updates that let it use your computer, generate images, and remember from past experiences. The package of updates comes as OpenAI's rivalry with Anthropic intensifies, following the stellar successes of Claude Code and OpenAI aggressively shifting resources to catch up.
Codex will now be able to operate desktop apps on your computer, OpenAI says in a blog post announcing the update. It can work in the background, meaning it won't interfere with your own work in other apps, and multiple agents can work in parallel. For developers, OpenAI says, "this is he …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: OpenAI的大规模Codex更新是对Claude Code的直接打击
zh.summary: OpenAI通过桌面应用控制、图像生成和上下文保留功能显著升级了Codex，直接针对Claude Code的竞争优势。此更新反映了OpenAI在开发者针对的AI工具中积极追赶时的竞争加剧。

title: Google’s AI Mode update lets you open links without leaving the page
summary: Google's AI Mode now opens source links alongside the chat interface instead of new tabs, enabling seamless follow-up questions about page content. This usability improvement builds on recent enhancements to the search chatbot that launched last year.
content:
Google is upgrading AI Mode in Chrome with a new feature that will allow you to open links to sources alongside your chat. Now, instead of automatically opening a new tab, clicking a source will open the website side by side with AI Mode, allowing you to ask follow-up questions about what's on the page.
Launched last year, AI Mode is the chatbot-like search feature that lives within a tab on the left side of Google's search engine. Google has added several new features to the tool over the past year, including the ability to generate images of outfits and decor based on your descriptions, visualize your travel plans, and find restaurant res …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: Gemini can now create personalized AI images by digging around in Google Photos
summary: Google's Gemini can now generate personalized images by accessing user photos from Google Photos library, enabling AI image creation tailored to individual style and preferences. The integration deepens personalization in Gemini's generative capabilities.
content: Google is making it easier to feed your photos into Nano Banana for more personal image generation.

zh.title: Gemini现在可以通过浏览Google相册来创建个性化的AI图像

title: RFK Jr. forces FDA to reconsider 12 unproven peptides after 2023 ban
summary: Kennedy administration pressure has prompted the FDA to reconsider its 2023 ban on 12 unproven peptide treatments despite the absence of new safety or efficacy data. The move raises concerns about evidence-based drug approval processes and regulatory consistency.
content: There doesn't seem to be new safety or efficacy data, but Kennedy touts them anyway.

title: First look: Also's upcoming e-bike disconnects the pedals and wheels
summary: Also is developing an e-bike that disconnects pedals and wheels, using software algorithms to create a novel riding experience. The radical design bet demonstrates how software engineering can transform traditional vehicle categories.
content: The company bets that software can create a distinct—and better—riding experience.

title: Two Americans sentenced for helping North Korea steal $5 million in fake IT worker scheme
summary: The Justice Department sentenced two Americans who assisted North Korea in placing fraudulent IT workers within U.S. companies to steal approximately $5 million. The case highlights security vulnerabilities as malicious actors exploit remote work arrangements at scale.
content: The U.S. Department of Justice announced that two Americans were sentenced to years in prison for helping the North Korean government place fake IT workers in U.S. companies.

title: InsightFinder raises $15M to help companies figure out where AI agents go wrong
summary: InsightFinder raised $15 million to provide monitoring and diagnostics for AI systems within enterprise tech stacks, addressing the challenge of understanding system-wide performance as AI becomes integrated throughout organizations. The funding reflects growing demand for AI observability solutions.
content: According to CEO Helen Gu, the biggest problem facing the industry today is not just monitoring and diagnosing where AI models go wrong — it's also diagnosing how the entire tech stack operates now that AI is part of it.

zh.title: InsightFinder融资1500万美元以帮助公司找出AI代理哪里出错
zh.summary: InsightFinder融资1500万美元，为企业技术堆栈中的AI系统提供监控和诊断，解决了AI在整个组织中集成时理解系统整体性能的挑战。该融资反映了对AI可观测性解决方案日益增长的需求。

title: Microsoft planning Surface Laptop with an OLED display

The Surface Laptop 7. | Photo by Chris Welch / The Verge	

Microsoft is preparing to launch new Surface Pro and Surface Laptop models in the coming months. Windows Central reports that the refreshed models will include both Intel and Qualcomm variants, with Microsoft opting for an OLED display option for the Surface Laptop this year.
Microsoft is expected to launch new Surface Pro and Laptop models with Intel's Core Ultra 3 chips first, followed by Qualcomm Snapdragon X2 variants later this summer. This is reportedly because Qualcomm's latest chips are in short supply, but it reverses Microsoft's trend of shipping Qualcomm-powered Surface devices to consumers first in recent years.
While a RAM cri …

title: AI traffic to US retailers rose 393% in Q1, and it’s boosting their revenue too
summary: Adobe reports AI traffic to U.S. retail websites surged 393% in Q1 2026, with AI shoppers converting at higher rates and generating more revenue than human visitors. The data demonstrates strong consumer adoption of AI-assisted shopping and measurable economic impact.
content: Adobe says AI traffic to U.S. retail sites also jumped 269% in March, with visitors converting better and generating more revenue than non-AI shoppers.

zh.title: 美国零售商的AI流量在第一季度增长了393%，并提升了其收入

title: Roblox’s AI assistant gets new agentic tools to plan, build, and test games

title: DJI’s Osmo Pocket 4 camera is better at capturing slo-mo footage and photos
summary: DJI announced the Osmo Pocket 4, featuring improved low-light performance with an upgraded sensor and higher frame rates compared to the Osmo Pocket 3. The camera will not be available in the US market due to ongoing regulatory approval issues.
content:
The Osmo Pocket 4 is better at shooting in low light situations with an improved sensor and new fill light accessory. | Image: DJI	

Following months of leaks, DJI has announced the fourth version of its handheld stabilized vlogger camera. Unlike the Osmo Pocket 3 that debuted way back in September 2023 with major upgrades like a 1-inch sensor and a larger rotating touchscreen, the new Osmo Pocket 4 features similar hardware with upgraded capabilities including higher frame rates and built-in storage.
As with recently introduced DJI products like the Osmo Nano action cam, the Avata 360 drone, and the Osmo Mobile 8 stabilizer, the Osmo Pocket 4 won't launch in the US. "The Osmo Pocket 4 will not be available in the US market as the application for authorization is still p …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: DJI Osmo Pocket 4相机在捕捉慢动作视频和照片方面表现更佳
zh.summary: DJI推出了Osmo Pocket 4，采用升级的传感器实现更好的低光性能，相比Osmo Pocket 3提供更高的帧率。由于持续的监管批准问题，该相机将不在美国市场上市。

title: Govee’s new LED Lightwall comes with its own self-standing frame
summary: Govee unveiled its new Lightwall LED display at $449.99, featuring 1,536 color-changing LEDs and a self-standing aluminum frame that assembles without tools. The display is more than twice as expensive as its previous Curtain Lights Pro but offers denser LED coverage and flexible placement options.
content:
Govee has announced an upgraded version of its hanging Curtain Lights Pro that can instead be used nearly anywhere you have access to an outlet or large battery. At $449.99, Govee's new Lightwall is more than twice as expensive as the $199.99 Curtain Lights Pro, but comes with more LEDs in a denser array and a self-standing aluminum frame that can be assembled in 10 to 15 minutes without the need for any tools.
When hung from its stand the Lightwall measures 7.9 feet wide and 5.3 feet tall and features 1,536 color-changing LEDs spaced about 1.96 inches apart in a 48 x 32 grid. It's water-resistant, and with the ability to refresh at up to 3 …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Govee新款LED Lightwall配备自立式框架
zh.summary: Govee推出新款Lightwall LED显示屏，售价$449.99，具有1,536个可变色LED和自立铝制框架，可无工具组装。该显示屏的价格是其前代Curtain Lights Pro的两倍多，但提供更密集的LED覆盖和灵活的放置选项。

title: Spotify just won $322 million from music pirates it can’t find
summary: Spotify and three major music labels won a $322 million default judgment against Anna's Archive after it scraped 86 million songs from Spotify to create a public "preservation archive." The judgment came after Anna's Archive failed to respond to the lawsuit.
content:
Spotify and the three major labels have won a $322 million default judgement against Anna's Archive, the open-source library and pirate activist group that planned to publicly release millions of music files scraped from Spotify's platform. 
The judgment comes after the unknown operator of Anna's Archive failed to respond to a lawsuit filed by Spotify, Universal Music Group (UMG), Warner Music Group (WMG) and Sony Music, which was made publicly available in January. The lawsuit was launched in response to Anna's Archive announcing in December that it had ripped 86 million songs from Spotify and intended to create a "preservation archive" fo …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Spotify从找不到的音乐盗版者那里赢得3.22亿美元赔偿
zh.summary: Spotify和三家主要唱片公司对Anna's Archive获得3.22亿美元的缺席判决，因为Anna's Archive从Spotify抓取了8600万首歌曲来创建公开的"保存档案库"。由于Anna's Archive未能回应诉讼，获得了该判决。

title: The race to Shackleton Crater is on—will Jeff Bezos or China get there first?
summary: US and Chinese lunar landers could operate in close proximity on the Moon later in 2026 as both nations race to reach Shackleton Crater. The competition reflects intensifying efforts to explore and potentially exploit the Moon's south polar region.
content: US and Chinese landers could be operating in close proximity on the Moon later this year.

title: DeepL, known for text translation, now wants to translate your voice
summary: DeepL is expanding beyond text translation to voice translation, enabling real-time voice translation for meeting tools like Zoom and Microsoft Teams. The expansion positions DeepL to compete in the growing market for AI-powered language services.
content: DeepL says its tech could be used for real-time translation with meeting tools like Zoom and Microsoft Teams

zh.title: 以文本翻译著称的DeepL现在想翻译你的声音
zh.summary: DeepL正在将业务从文本翻译扩展到语音翻译，为Zoom和Microsoft Teams等会议工具实现实时语音翻译。这一扩展使DeepL能够在不断增长的AI驱动语言服务市场中竞争。
